title: KAZAKHSTAN / ARAL SEA - Moments for Monuments
description:
I saw your film - aral sea. - When i was little i heard about this problem but never see it, didn't imagine how it can be. So so much new from your film for me and deep impression and the sound ..
Ioulia Morozova, Moscow, 1.2.2005

Ideas of man
when they are right
and when they are wrong
are more powerful
than we commonly understand.
